global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text and geometric elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging players to join and compete for rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: NeonArena logo
elements.description: A stylized logo with the text 'NeonArena' in bold, bright colors, prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Beat your rivals Free rewards for new players' in a clear, bold font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A geometric shape or design element positioned at the top, possibly in a bright color.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: Another geometric shape or design element located in the center, complementing the main message.

elements.label: Top left element
elements.description: A small, possibly interactive element located at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Top right element
elements.description: A small element positioned at the top right, likely decorative or functional.

elements.label: Center small element
elements.description: A small element located in the center, possibly an icon or button.

elements.label: Top center small element
elements.description: A small decorative element at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: Top left small element
elements.description: A small element located at the top left, possibly an icon.

elements.label: Center bottom small element
elements.description: A small element located at the center bottom, possibly an interactive feature.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The prominent headline 'NeonArena' displayed in a large, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Secondary message text
elements.description: A secondary message in bold text, emphasizing rewards for new players.
elements.text_content: Beat your rivals Free rewards for new players

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear call to action button labeled 'Start now' at the bottom of the ad.
